title: 5 Tips for Deploying AI Agents to Production
summary: AWS Developers outlines five production best practices for TypeScript AI agents: streaming tool call events for UI responsiveness, layered authentication with OAuth and IAM, type-safe contracted database access with tenant isolation, guardrails with cost budgets and model routing, and observability via metrics and distributed tracing. The recommendations emphasize scaling from localhost prototypes to production systems handling real users.
